scripts.zip: npm run build && OUT=$(pwd) && TMP=$(mktemp -d) && rsync -a --exclude='.git' --exclude='.gitignore' --exclude='.svnignore' --exclude='.editorconfig' --exclude='.DS_Store' --exclude='node_modules/' --exclude='src/' --exclude='assets/css/src/' --exclude='node_scripts/' --exclude='postcss.config.js' --exclude='package.json' --exclude='package-lock.json' --exclude='*.js.map' --exclude='matchday-blocks.zip' ./ $TMP/matchday-blocks/ && cd $TMP && zip -r matchday-blocks.zip matchday-blocks && mv matchday-blocks.zip $OUT/ && rm -rf $TMP && echo "Created $OUT/matchday-blocks.zip"
